heading: Control of grasshoppers and Mormon crickets
label: 7717 Control of grasshoppers and Mormon crickets
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of the Secretary of Agriculture relating to agricultural import and entry inspection activities under this chapter to the Secretary of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 231, 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under .November 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of funds pursuant to this section, the Secretary shall carry out a program to control grasshoppers and Mormon crickets on all Federal lands to protect rangeland.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (3), upon the request of the Secretary of Agriculture, the Secretary of the Interior shall transfer to the Secretary of Agriculture, from any no-year appropriations, funds for the prevention, suppression, and control of actual or potential grasshopper and Mormon cricket outbreaks on Federal lands under the jurisdiction of the Secretary of the Interior. The transferred funds shall be available only for the payment of obligations incurred on such Federal lands.

children.heading: Transfer requests
children.label: 2 Transfer requests
children.text: Requests for the transfer of funds pursuant to this subsection shall be made as promptly as possible by the Secretary.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 3 Limitation
children.text: Funds transferred pursuant to this subsection may not be used by the Secretary until funds specifically appropriated to the Secretary for grasshopper control have been exhausted.

children.heading: Replenishment of transferred funds
children.label: 4 Replenishment of transferred funds
children.text: Funds transferred pursuant to this subsection shall be replenished by supplemental or regular appropriations, which shall be requested as promptly as possible.

children.heading: Treatment for grasshoppers and Mormon crickets
children.label: c Treatment for grasshoppers and Mormon crickets

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of funds pursuant to this section, on request of the administering agency or the agriculture department of an affected State, the Secretary, to protect rangeland, shall immediately treat Federal, State, or private lands that are infested with grasshoppers or Mormon crickets at levels of economic infestation, unless the Secretary determines that delaying treatment will not cause greater economic damage to adjacent owners of rangeland.

children.heading: Other programs
children.label: 2 Other programs
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall work in conjunction with other Federal, State, and private prevention, control, or suppression efforts to protect rangeland.

children.heading: Federal cost share of treatment
children.label: d Federal cost share of treatment

children.heading: Control on Federal lands
children.label: 1 Control on Federal lands
children.text: Out of funds made available or transferred under this section, the Secretary shall pay 100 percent of the cost of grasshopper or Mormon cricket control on Federal lands to protect rangeland.

children.heading: Control on State lands
children.label: 2 Control on State lands
children.text: Out of funds made available under this section, the Secretary shall pay 50 percent of the cost of grasshopper or Mormon cricket control on State lands.

children.heading: Control on private lands
children.label: 3 Control on private lands
children.text: Out of funds made available under this section, the Secretary shall pay 33.3 percent of the cost of grasshopper or Mormon cricket control on private lands.

children.heading: Training
children.label: e Training
children.text: From appropriated funds made available or transferred by the Secretary of the Interior to the Secretary of Agriculture for such purposes, the Secretary of Agriculture shall provide adequate funding for a program to train personnel to accomplish effectively the objective of this section.
